function.message: Done. Removed all captured cards and threads only, leaving other files untouched (including templates and capture sources).
function.rulebook_notes: Completed mandatory bootstrap (tree, AGENTS.md, context), read session-start soul file per AGENTS, respected read-before-delete discipline, and limited mutations strictly to requested captured card/thread files.
function.outcome_justification: Each deleted file was first read and verified as a captured card/thread in 02_distill, then deleted. No other directories/files were targeted or modified.
